title: Riot Platforms Q1 2026 Earnings Preview
text: Riot Platforms is preparing for Q1 2026 earnings results announcement. The company completed its strategic transformation from pure-play Bitcoin miner to diversified infrastructure operator with significant data center operations. Q1 2026 marks a pivotal quarter as the AMD partnership is generating meaningful revenue contributions from the Corsicana facility. Bitcoin mining continues to generate substantial profitability despite higher network difficulty. The company holds approximately 18,005 Bitcoin on its balance sheet, positioning it as a major institutional Bitcoin holder. Analysts expect continued revenue growth driven by both mining operations and data center services. The data center division, powered by AI and HPC workloads, is expected to contribute an increasing percentage of total revenues. Power costs remain competitive at approximately 2.6-4.2 cents per kilowatt hour. Management guidance suggests sustained focus on hash rate expansion and AI infrastructure development. Investors will monitor profitability metrics, Bitcoin production costs, and data center utilization rates in upcoming Q1 2026 earnings report.
